title: URBAN REST STOP - 211info
text: ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD URBAN REST STOP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides showers and laundry facilities. 2424 N Pacific Highway Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Households experiencing homelessness Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 9am-1pm Email (541) 772-3828 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 772-3828 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in and register onsite FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 10am-2pm Services: Laundry Facilities Public Showers/Baths Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - DINING ROOM FOOD - FOOD PANTRY HOUSING/SHELTER - ST ANTHONY EMERGENCY FAMILY SHELTER MATERIAL GOODS - SOCIAL SERVICES MATERIAL GOODS - THRIFT STORE UTILITIES - UTILITY AND RENT ASSISTANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ST VINCENT DE PAUL MEDFORD
